query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.phone, u.id as userId, u.username 
FROM partners p 
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.phone = u.username 
WHERE p.name = '测试合伙人' 
ORDER BY p.id DESC 
LIMIT 1;
